heading: Western Area Power Administration; deposit and availability of discretionary offsetting collections
label: 7276f Western Area Power Administration; deposit and availability of discretionary offsetting collections
text: Notwithstanding , , and , funds collected by the Western Area Power Administration from the sale of power and related services that are applicable to the repayment of the annual expenses of this account in this and subsequent fiscal years shall be credited to this account as discretionary offsetting collections for the sole purpose of funding such expenses, with such funds remaining available until expended: , That for purposes of this appropriation, annual expenses means expenditures that are generally recovered in the same year that they are incurred (excluding purchase power and wheeling expenses).section 3302 of title 31section 825s of title 16section 392a of title 43Provided further
notes: References in Text“This account” and “this appropriation”, referred to in text, mean funds appropriated under the heading “” of title III of the Energy and Water Development and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2010, .Construction, Rehabilitation, Operation and Maintenance, Western Area Power AdministrationPub. L. 111–85

CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Energy and Water Development and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2010, and not as part of the Department of Energy Organization Act which comprises this chapter.
